---
title: 'All examples'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = "man/figures/")
```

Welcome to the toro examples gallery! These interactive examples demonstrate how to create powerful map visualizations using toro.

Use the navigation menu on the left to explore all available examples, or click the links below to jump to specific examples:

## Sources

Sources are required to add data to your map.

### [Add a GeoJSON/sf source](sources/add-geojson-source.html)

![Add a data source from a GeoJSON file (sf object or GeoJSON string).](../../man/figures/add-geojson-source.png)

### [Add a feature service source](sources/add-feature-service-source.html)

![Add web based features (e.g. ArcGIS data layers) to your map as a source for additional layers.](../../man/figures/add-feature-source.png)

### [Add an image source](sources/add-image-source.html)

![Add static images (png, svg, gif, jpg) to your map from a local file or web URL.](../../man/figures/add-image-source.png)

---

## Layers

### [Add a fill layer](layers/add-fill-layer.html)

![Adding shapes / complex geometry to your map and rendering the shapes based on attributes in the data (e.g. colour by population).](../../man/figures/add-fill-layer.png)

### [Add a line layer](layers/add-line-layer.html)

![Adding lines (collection of points) to your map and customising their appearance.](../../man/figures/add-line-layer.png)

### [Add a circle layer](layers/add-circle-layer.html)

![Adding circles to your map and customising their appearance.](../../man/figures/add-circle-layer.png)

### [Add a symbol layer](layers/add-symbol-layer.html)

![Adding customised image based markers (from image source) to your maps.](../../man/figures/add-symbol-layer.png)

### [Add a text layer](layers/add-text-layer.html)

![Adding descriptive text or data attributes to the map, based on coordinates.](../../man/figures/add-text-layer.png)

### [Latitude and longitude grid](layers/lat-lng-grid.html)

![Showing a reference grid of latitude & longitude on the map, overlaying other features.](../../man/figures/add-lat-lng-grid.png)

## Controls

### [Draw control](controls/draw-control.html)

![Enabling functionality to create new shapes / lines on your map.](../../man/figures/draw-control.png)
